introSection:
Galacticoaster is an enclosed steel roller coaster from German manufacturer ART Engineering currently under construction at Legoland Florida in Winter Haven, Florida, USA.

In December 2025, Legoland Florida announced an opening date of March 6, 2026.
fullText:
Galacticoaster is an enclosed steel roller coaster from German manufacturer ART Engineering currently under construction at Legoland Florida in Winter Haven, Florida, USA.

In December 2025, Legoland Florida announced an opening date of March 6, 2026.
